mapper.sql: ( ( LC.START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND LC.END_DATE IS NOT NULL AND LC.START_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 AND LC.END_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ) OR ( LC.START_DATE IS NOT NULL AND LC.END_DATE IS NULL AND LC.START_DATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 0.99999 ) OR ( LC.START_DATE IS NULL AND LC.CREATED_AT BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 0.99999 ) )

LAST_SUB AS ( SELECT S.* FROM ASSIGN_SUB S JOIN ( SELECT ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID, MAX(SUB_ID) AS MAX_SUB_ID FROM ASSIGN_SUB GROUP BY ASSIGN_ID, STUDENT_ID ) MX ON MX.MAX_SUB_ID = S.SUB_ID ), LAST_FDB AS ( SELECT F.* FROM ASSIGN_FDB F JOIN ( SELECT SUB_ID, MAX(ASSIGN_FBD_ID) AS MAX_FDB_ID FROM ASSIGN_FDB GROUP BY SUB_ID ) MXF ON MXF.MAX_FDB_ID = F.ASSIGN_FBD_ID ), ASSIGN_STATUS_VIEW AS ( SELECT A.ASSIGN_ID, SUB.STUDENT_ID, SUB.SUB_ID, A.TITLE, A.DUE_AT, CASE WHEN SUB.SUB_ID IS NULL THEN '미제출' WHEN NVL(TRIM(SUB.RETURN_REASON), '') <> '' THEN '반려' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('RETURNED', 'REJECTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '반려' THEN '반려' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('FEEDBACK_COMPLETED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '확인완료' THEN '확인완료' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('RESUBMIT', 'RESUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '재제출' THEN '재제출' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('LATE', 'LATE_SUBMIT', 'LATE_SUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '늦은제출' THEN '늦은제출' WHEN UPPER(NVL(SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS, '')) IN ('COMPLETED', 'COMPLETE', 'SUBMITTED') OR SUB.SUBMIT_STATUS = '제출완료' THEN '제출완료' WHEN SUB.SUBMIT_AT IS NOT NULL AND A.DUE_AT IS NOT NULL AND SUB.SUBMIT_AT > A.DUE_AT THEN '늦은제출' ELSE '미제출' END AS NORMALIZED_STATUS FROM ASSIGNMENT A LEFT JOIN LAST_SUB SUB ON SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID AND SUB.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} WHERE A.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_CONT LC JOIN LEARN_LIST LL ON LL.LEARN_LIST_ID = LC.LEARN_LIST_ID
WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LEARN_CONT LC JOIN LEARN_LIST LL ON LL.LEARN_LIST_ID = LC.LEARN_LIST_ID JOIN LEARN_PRO LP ON LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND LP.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND UPPER(NVL(LP.STATUS, '')) = 'COMPLETED'
WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND

SELECT LC.LEARN_ID AS "learnId", LC.TITLE AS "title", TO_CHAR(LC.END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "endDate", TO_CHAR(LC.START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "deadline" FROM LEARN_CONT LC JOIN LEARN_LIST LL ON LL.LEARN_LIST_ID = LC.LEARN_LIST_ID
WHERE LL.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND NVL(LC.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM LEARN_PRO LP WHERE LP.LEARN_ID = LC.LEARN_ID AND LP.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} AND UPPER(NVL(LP.STATUS, '')) = 'COMPLETED' ) AND ORDER BY LC.END_DATE ASC NULLS LAST, LC.LEARN_ID DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT A
WHERE A.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND
WITH SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGN_STATUS_VIEW V WHERE V.NORMALIZED_STATUS IN ('제출완료', '재제출', '늦은제출', '확인완료')

WITH SELECT V.ASSIGN_ID AS "assignmentId", V.TITLE AS "title", TO_CHAR(V.DUE_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "dueDate" FROM ASSIGN_STATUS_VIEW V WHERE V.NORMALIZED_STATUS = '미제출' ORDER BY V.DUE_AT ASC NULLS LAST, V.ASSIGN_ID DESC

WITH SELECT A.ASSIGN_ID AS "assignmentId", A.TITLE AS "title", DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(FDB.FEEDBACK_CONTENT, 4000, 1) AS "feedback" FROM ASSIGNMENT A JOIN LAST_SUB SUB ON SUB.ASSIGN_ID = A.ASSIGN_ID AND SUB.STUDENT_ID = #{studentId} JOIN LAST_FDB FDB ON FDB.SUB_ID = SUB.SUB_ID
WHERE A.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND NVL(A.DELETE_YN, 0) = 0 AND NVL(TRIM(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(FDB.FEEDBACK_CONTENT, 4000, 1)), '') <> '' AND ORDER BY FDB.CREATED_AT DESC, A.ASSIGN_ID DESC
SELECT SC.STUDENT_ID FROM STUDENT_CLASS SC WHERE SC.CLASS_ID = #{classId} AND SC.END_DATE IS NULL ORDER BY SC.STUDENT_ID ASC
